infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HouseMate  uses the camera to capture photos inside the app before you publish them.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HouseMate  accesses your photo library to let you choose media that appears in the app.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HouseMate  uses the microphone to record audio tracks that the app attaches to your creations.
